channel.title: Essays on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Essays on Zymacs

item.title: Thoughts on Control in the Age of AI
item.description: I have a lot of personal opinion on AI. Most of it shaped around my experience using LLMS. I think AI is not LLMs. I think the conflation of the term AI and LLMs is non trivial. But that's just one of the points about which I'd like to keep notes in this document. Other areas include how thoughts on if we need LLMs, how to outsource to humble tools what is said to be only accomplishable with LLMs. How to stay as in control as someone using a CLI when using tools that are LLM like, opinions on why LLMs are sold as they are and anything I find of interest in relation to this topic.
